title: デビュー戦の後に・はじめて！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara places first for the first time ever! Her
desire to enter more races is stronger than ever
before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On her way home, Haru Urara spots her shopping
district friends, and they unveil a banner they
made to celebrate her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to get stronger to make her beloved
shopkeepers proud.
